SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession. Note: Download sequence should be initiated only 10 secs after tool is connected

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

SESSION.NAME: supplierProgrammingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to grant special privileges to the module and vehicle manufacturers. Diagnostic session 61H is reserved only for use by developers and test tools in manufacturing and assembly plants. SupplierProgrammingSession runs in boot software and is used to enter Netloader/Fastboot mode.

Bluetooth Low Energy Module (BLEM) Present & Unprovisioned

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Pre-Distribution Alert Generated and Post Distribution Alert Generated
Pre-Distribution Alert Published and Post Distribution Alert Generated

DTC_SNAPSHOT_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The first time since DTC information was cleared or the DTC was aged that DTC status bit 3 (confirmedDTC) is set to 1.

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ECG fully boot up; Electronic Horizon is configured, i.e., ElectronicHorizonAvailability in DID DE01 is set as either "Full EH Enabled or ISA EH Enabled; DTC can ONLY be set when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Connected EH app can load needed EH map data and supports the region configured in "tcuDestRegion" of 0xDE00 ; Failure Criteria: Connected EH app cannot load or does not find EH map data for the region configured in "tcuDestRegion" of 0xDE00 OR the region is not supported.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: HS2 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: HS2 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P21 / CAN_H pin P8

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: HS1/FD3 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: HS1/FD3 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P20 / CAN_H pin P7

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: MS1 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: MS1 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P16 / CAN_H pin P3

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: HS3 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: HS3 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P22 / CAN_H pin P9

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: FD1 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: FD1 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P17 / CAN_H pin P4

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: MS2/HS1 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: MS2/HS1 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P24 / CAN_H pin P11

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: DIAG1 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: DIAG1 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P18 / CAN_H pin P5

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: FD2/HS4 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: FD2/HS4 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P23 / CAN_H pin P10

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: DIAG2 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: DIAG2 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P19 / CAN_H pin P6

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: HS5/FD4 CAN bus communication is operational. Failure Criteria: HS5/FD4 CAN bus communication not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Reset. if it doesn't help - failure

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: CAN_L pin P25 / CAN_H pin P12

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Near Field Communication Authorization Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and NFAM are required to boot up; NFAM is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: NFAM provisioning data is received within 300 sec when ECG and NFAM both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from NFAM within 300 sec when ECG and OBCC both boot up.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision NFAM if NFAM is not provisioned

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Remote Function Actuation Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and BLEM are required to boot up; BLEM is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: BLEM provisioning data is received by ECG within 300 sec when ECG and BLEM both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from BLEM within 300 sec when ECG and BLEM both boot up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision BLEM if BLEM is not provisioned

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Image Processing Module A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: The conditions used to set this DTC shall be when 1. ADA Presence = 1 - ADA Present in 0xDE01; 2. bSAllow_Feature69 = "1 - On" in DE17; 3. bPAllow_Feature69 = "1 - On" in DE1A; 4. The meta entity for vehicle connectivity, which is a user toggle in the SYNC HMI, is ON. If SYNC is not in the loop, the default value is ON. These checks shall be performed during application startup.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Valid, non-expired map present. Failure Criteria: The Stale Status of the present map has a value of 0x1 or DID 0x9140 reads ZU5T-14H394-XXX00000 signifying a missing or corrupt map
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Generic Function Module 2

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and OBCC are required to boot up; OBCC is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: OBCC provisioning data is received within 300 sec when ECG and OBCC both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from OBCC within 300 sec when ECG and OBCC both boot up.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision OBCC if OBCC is not provisioned

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Vehicle Inhibited Due To Vehicle Start Inhibit (VSI)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Whenever the vehicle is inhibited
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Vehicle Start Inhibit On Board Server De-inhibit the vehicle and send back its new status to Vehicle Start Inhibit On Board Client (FleetVehicleLimit1_Rsp = NoLimitRequested and/or FleetVehicleLimit2_Rsp = NoLimitRequested). Failure Criteria: Vehicle Start Inhibit On Board Server inhibit the vehicle and send back its new status to Vehicle Start Inhibit On Board Client (FleetVehicleLimit1_Rsp = PowerPackBlock_Inhibit and/or FleetVehicleLimit2_Rsp = PowerPackBlock_Inhibit).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: The driver will no more be able to turn the vehicle On (after a Key Cycle if already on)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Link between CCPU and VMCU is operational. Failure Criteria: Link between CCPU and VMCU is not operational.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: After attempting to bring up connection for 30 seconds post boot, stop trying to initiate a setup and wait for setup message from VMCU. Issue DTC if a connection fails to be established.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Initial Method 2 Configuration Not Completed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: ECU has received Initial configuration for DE00 Failure Criteria:ECG has not received initial configuration for DE00
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG will not transmit VIN information via TCP/IP. ECG cannot be authorized
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: VIN info is not trasmitted over TCP/IP

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1) ON-DEMAND SELF TEST is invoked, and ignition is ON and LCM=Factory Mode Or 2) IGN OFF-> ON and vehicle life cycle mode = FACTORY
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every ignition cycle and LCM=Factory.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: ECG configuration is compatible with HW variant and follow conditions are true: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Non-connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Not Presented and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to OFF: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Non-connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Presented and to be provisioned and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to OFF: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Presented and to be provisioned and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to ON: Fail Criteria: One of the following conditions are true: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Non-connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Not Presented and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to ON: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Non-connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Presented and to be provisioned and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to ON: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Not Presented and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to OFF: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Not Presented and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to ON: Vehicle_Market_Config (DE00 byte 9 bit 5) set to Connected Market, TCU Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 0) is set to Presented and to be provisioned and Cellular Connectivity (DE19 byte 2 bit 6) is set to OFF; CV2X_Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 7) set to Presented and to be provisioned, but TCU is not a CV2X capable device; CV2X_Presence (DE00 byte 9 bit 7) set to Not Presented but TCU is a CV2X capable device.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: DTC shall be present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Vehicle equipped modem may not be able to exchange data with cloud if vehicle is misconfigured as non-connected market feature and modem may not be fully operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1) ON-DEMAND SELF TEST is invoked, and ignition is ON and LCM=Factory Mode Or 2) IGN OFF-> ON and vehicle life cycle mode = FACTORY
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once every ignition cycle and LCM=Factory.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: PTTBFeatureConfiguration (DE01 byte 2 bit 0) set to "Enabled" and follow conditions are true: Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Gasoline", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Diesel", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Gas/Electric Hybrid (FHEV)", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Electric Only (BEV)", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Gas/Plug in Electric Vehicle (pHEV)" Failure Criteria: PTTBFeatureConfiguration (DE01 byte 2 bit 0) set to "Enabled" and follow conditions are true: Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "not configured", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Hydrogen Fuel Cell", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Diesel/Electric Hybrid", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "Compressed Natural Gas (CNG)", OR Engine Type (DE00 byte 1 bit 3) is set to "reserved"
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: DTC shall be present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Power to the Box/Pro Power OnBoard HMI will not be available and feature may not be fully operational.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: operation cycle starts when OVTP Key manager session is open, ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the KeyM client Shall run when the KeyM OVTP application sends an NRC
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Successful execution of Key Manager Backup EGKT function FID 0x15 on the server Fail criteria: Error/NRC during execution of Key Manager Backup EGKT function FID 0x15 on the server
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log Snapshot DIDs

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: operation cycle starts when OVTP Key manager session is open, ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the KeyM client. Shall run when the KeyM OVTP application sends an NRC. Test Shall run during the OVTP Key Management session is open and end with the OVTP Key Management session.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Key Manager Application reports successful execution of the key management function. Fail criteria: Key Manager Application reports error during execution of the key management function.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log Snapshot Information for the DTC.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: SecOC sends authentication failure notification Test Shall be Run once the SecOC sends Authentication Failures crossed the threshold value
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: If the number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC component are less than the Authentication Error Threshold DID 0xC028 within the Authentication Monitor Time Window DID 0xC023, the test shall be considered as Pass. Fail criteria: If the number of authentication failure notifications from the SecOC component are equal to or greater than Authentication Error Threshold DID 0xc028 within the Authentication Monitor Time Window DID 0xC023, the test shall be considered as Fail. Note: Authentication Monitor Time Window: 60 seconds Authentication error Threshold: 100
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log Snapshot Information for the DTC.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: The self-test shall be triggered by any of the following events. After ECU wakes up; After an ECU reset; After receiving a KeyAgreementTest request in OVTP group key distribution application AND if the PlaintextChallenge in KeyAgreementTest request function is the same as the SelfTestChallenge.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: Self-test success notification from the Client Key Manager application Fail criteria: Self-test fail notification from the Client Key Manager application
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1. When ECG is powered on to ensure no data is corrupted during power cycle 2. When KeyM AIDs are triggered on ECG to ensure data elements are accessible during AID execution 3. When data elements are written into NVM - to ensure data can be updated
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Shall run once while accessing the NVM data elements for TRON
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: KeyM able to successfully write, read and validate the data elements in NVM; Fail criteria: KeyM not able to write, read and validate the data elements in NVM
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Check the ECU CSKIST Status DID 0xC027 every 500ms
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: ECU-SKIST status is not set to 0x00 (ECU-SKIST != 0x00) Fail criteria: ECU-SKIST status is set to 0x00 (ECU-SKIST == 0x00)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: KeyM client can send the Trip Reset Sync message with latest trip counter and latest reset counter value (Message ID 0x9A) a least once in a 2 second time window. Fail criteria: Key Manager Client is unable to send the Trip Reset Sync Messages with latest trip counter and latest reset counter values for more than 2 seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Send Valid data in message 0x9A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: operation cycle starts when OVTP Key manager session is open, ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the KeyM client Shall run when the KeyM OVTP application detects invalid CSKIST States on any CMA module
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: All the KeyM servers have expected key injection status codes while executing the Key Management related AIDs. Test shall be considered as a pass if the CSKIS results in the valid state for an AID. For AID 0x0000 CSKIST state shall be 0x01 or 0x02 for all KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0001 CSKIST state shall be 0x00 for all KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0200 CSKIST state shall be 0x00,0x01,0x02 or 0x03 for all KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0202 CSKIST state shall be 0x00,0x01 or 0x02 for all KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0100 CSKIST state shall be 0x01 or 0x02 for all KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0101 CSKIST state shall be 0x00 for the target KeyM server to pass the test; For AID 0x0102 CSKIST state shall be 0x00 for the target KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0103 CSKIST state shall be 0x01 or 0x02 for the target KeyM servers to pass the test; For AID 0x0105 CSKIST state shall be 0x00,0x01 or 0x03 for all KeyM servers to pass the test. Fail criteria: For each of the AID below, if the KeyM client detects the Invalid States in the CSKIST, the KeyM client shall consider the test to be failed. For AID 0x0000 any KeyM server has CSKIST 0x00,0x03,0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0001 any KeyM server has CSKIST 0x01,0x02,0x03,0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0200 any KeyM server has CSKIST 0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0202 any KeyM server has CSKIST 0x03, 0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0100 any KeyM server has CSKIST 0x00,0x03,0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0101 Target KeyM server has CSKIST 0x01,0x02,0x03, 0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0102 any Target KeyM server has CSKIST 0x01,0x02,0x03, 0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0103 any Target KeyM server has CSKIST 0x00,0x03,0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail; For AID 0x0105 any of the KeyM server has CSKIST 0x04 or 0x05 test shall fail.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log Snapshot Information

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: operation cycle starts when OVTP Key manager session is open, ends with the OVTP key manager session close on the KeyM client ECG sends an error indicating Profiling was not successful on a module
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: KeyM client was able to successfully complete the profiling task Fail criteria: Key Manager Client is unable to complete the profiling task
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Shall run once the Key Update routines are triggered. operation cycle starts when routine 0x7014 and 0x7015 are triggered on ECG
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: KeyM client was able to successfully complete the Group Key Generation Task Fail criteria: Key Manager Client is unable to complete the Group Key Generation Task
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: operation cycle starts when routine 0x7014 and 0x7015 are triggered on ECG Shall run once the Key Update routines are triggered
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Test Shall run during the routines 0x7015 or 0x7014 are triggered on ECG
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: KeyM Client was able to successfully validate the signature/FESN/CCC/TOVTP/AID/GKSC and TOVTP in KUC/VIN number in the restore SyncP packet received from backend (or) successfully decode the received SYNCP packet Fail criteria: KeyM Client is unable to validate the signature/FESN/CCC/TOVTP/AID/GKSC and TOVTP in KUC/VIN number in the restore SyncP packet received from backend (or) unable to decode the SYNCP packet.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Log Snapshot Information for the DTC.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Shall run once the Key Update routines are triggered. operation cycle starts when routine 0x7014 and 0x7015 are triggered on ECG
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass criteria: KeyM client detected that the GKSC value read from target servers during profiling task is less than the possible max value for GKSC on SHE for all Dekey/Rekey/Restore AIDs Fail criteria: KeyM client detected that the GKSC value read from target servers during profiling task is more than or equal to the possible max value for GKSC on SHE for all Dekey/Rekey/Restore AIDs
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_C020 did_C024 did_C01D did_C02C did_C02E

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: If all Ethernet ECUs are learned Failure Criteria: If one or more Ethernet ECUs are not learned
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Depends on other DTCs: If there is a Lost Communication DTC set for the ECU (and possibly a Performance or Incorrect Operation DTC -- 0xE40x81), then the ECU should be replaced If there is an Invalid Serial Data Received DTC set (0xE40x92), then ECU should be replaced and/or inspected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: - Bad Ethernet port - Bad IPC link - Empty port where ECU should be - Illegal ECU being plugged in (sending invalid packets or cannot authenticate with SOA broker)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: On a ECG bootup
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: (1) SQLite data integrity check passes on active or golden copy DB. AND (2) CCS Policy File Consistency Check successful. Failure Criteria: (1) SQLite data integrity check fails on active and golden copy DB. OR (2). CCS Policy File Consistency Check failed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: DTC raised
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Customer Connectivity Settings menu not accessible

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Accessory Protocol Interface Module (APIM)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and SYNC are required to boot up; SYNC is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: SYNC provisioning data is received by ECG within 300 sec when ECG and SYNC both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from SYNC within 300 sec when ECG and SYNC both boot up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision SYNC if SYNC is not provisioned

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously while physical Ethernet connection is expected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Physical Ethernet connection is detected to APIM Fail Criteria: If physical Ethernet connection is not detected within device insertion timout from ECG boot up or physical Ethernet connection is unexpectedly interrupted and after ignition RUN. Device insertion timeout is dependent on ECU. Sync 4 / Phoenix Device Insertion Timeout = 300 seconds; DuerOS Device Insertion Timeout = 360 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Connected features on vehicle will not be available

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned. Failure Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU sends invalid message AND corresponding DTC 0xE40192 is set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned Failure Criteria: if Ethernet ECU SOA registration is not received or is invalid within device insertion timout from ECG boot up and after ignition RUN. ECG will close Ethernet port of ECU. Device insertion timeout is dependent on ECU. Sync 4 / Phoenix Device Insertion Timeout = 300 seconds; DuerOS Device Insertion Timeout = 360 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Telematic Control Unit Module (TCU)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and TCU are required to boot up; TCU is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCU provisioning data is received by ECG within 300 sec when ECG and TCU both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from TCU within 300 sec when ECG and TCU both boot up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision TCU if its not provisioned

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously while physical Ethernet connection is expected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Physical Ethernet connection is detected to TCU Fail Criteria: If physical Ethernet connection is not detected within 300s from ECG boot up or physical Ethernet connection is unexpectedly interrupted and after ignition RUN.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Connected features on vehicle will not be available

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned. Failure Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU sends invalid message AND corresponding DTC 0xE40292 is set.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned Failure Criteria: if Ethernet ECU SOA registration is not received or is invalid within 300s from ECG boot up and after ignition RUN. ECG will close Ethernet port of ECU
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Instrument Panel Cluster Control Module (IPC)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously while physical Ethernet connection is expected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Physical Ethernet connection is detected to IPC Fail Criteria: If physical Ethernet connection is not detected within 120s from ECG boot up or physical Ethernet connection is unexpectedly interrupted and after ignition RUN.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned. Failure Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU sends invalid message AND corresponding DTC 0xE40392 is set.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned Failure Criteria: if Ethernet ECU SOA registration is not received or is invalid within 120s from ECG boot up and after ignition RUN. ECG will close Ethernet port of ECU
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Image Processing Module "A" (IPMA)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Continuously while physical Ethernet connection is expected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: Physical Ethernet connection is detected to IPMA Fail Criteria: If physical Ethernet connection is not detected within 120s from ECG boot up or physical Ethernet connection is unexpectedly interrupted and after ignition RUN.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Ethernet reliant features between ECG and IPMA will not function such as BlueCruise

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned. Failure Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU sends invalid message AND corresponding DTC 0xE40492 is set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: During learning mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: if an Ethernet ECU is learned Failure Criteria: if Ethernet ECU SOA registration is not received or is invalid within 120s from ECG boot up and after ignition RUN. ECG will close Ethernet port of ECU
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable ethernet port of the ECU

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Automated Driving System Interface Module "A" (ADSIMA)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and AVPIM are required to boot up; AVPIM is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: AVPIM provisioning data is received by ECG within 300 sec when ECG and AVPIM both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from AVPIM within 300 sec when ECG and AVPIM both boot up.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision AVPIM if its not provisioned

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Ethernet Failure With Telematic Control Module "B" (TCUB)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Both ECG and TCUB are required to boot up; TCUB is configured to presented and to be provisioned in ECG DID DE00; DTC can ONLY be set/clear when DTC E10000 is cleared and ignition is ON.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: TCUB provisioning data is received by ECG within 300 sec when ECG and TCUB both boot up. Failure Criteria: ECG failed to receive provisioning data from TCUB within 300 sec when ECG and TCUB both boot up.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG shall raise the DTC and shall not provision TCUB if its not provisioned

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: On a boot, and continuously on each unrecoverable software failure up to 5 reboots in 5 minutes.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: ECU < 5 reboots in a 5min period. Failure Criteria: ECU 5 reboots in 5 min or less.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECG unable to communicate for OTA services

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, ACC or Delayed Acc. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Once at bootup and subsequently at runtime. Note: The ECG must be powered and active (awake) for at least 30 seconds before check the DTC in order for the test to complete. If DTC check is started prior to this time period after power-on or reset, the VMCU might respond with DTC status bit 6 "testNotCompletedThisOperationCycle" and the DTC check will fail.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when Read of a key listed in the keymgr config file cannot be read or decrypted
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If ECU does not get SOA authenticated and connected within 1 sec
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: When ECU connects to and authenticates with SOA Fail Criteria: If ECU fails to connect to and authenticate with SOA after 3 retries and the Ethernet link is up
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU may issue DTC for communications failure

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. Voltage is between 9 and 17 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Set DTC (1 or 2 or 3 or 4 or 5 or 6) (1) Ignition OFF->ON (2) Load a token (3) Remove a token (4) Every 24 hours (5) DET Service 0x14 (6) Power OFF->ON
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS Criteria: no token exists on ECG FAIL Criteria: any token exists on ECG (note: ap_logging token doesnt raise the DTC in current implementation)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: N/A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria: when Battery Voltage is Above (>) LO_BATT_THRESHOLD (configurable via DID FD06). Failure Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Below (<) (LO_BATT_THRESHOLD-BATT_HYSTERESIS) (configurable via DID FD06) for greater than 5sec (timing also configurable via DID FD06).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Conditions begin to shut down. MS-CAN communication will work until voltage drops below 9 volts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Normal Operating Conditions begin to shut down

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Below (<) HI_BATT_THRESHOLD (configurable via DID FD06) Failure Criteria:when Battery Voltage is Above (>)(HI_BATT_THRESHOLD+BATT_HYSTERESIS) (configurable via DID FD06) for 5sec (timing also configurable via DID FD06)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal Operating Conditions shall begin to shut down

Valid Application Software is NOT Present
